fabric_swatches.description: This handwoven Venkatagiri cotton saree is prized for its fine thread count and light drape. The plain with gold zari border is woven directly into the fabric — not printed. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps you cool through long days. Ideal for casual.

reviews.comment: Exactly what I needed for daily wear. Soft and breathable all day.
Ordered for my daughter's college. She gets compliments daily.

fabric_swatches.description: Woven in the Shantipur tradition of West Bengal, this Tant cotton saree is prized for its fine weave and light drape. The thin stripe adds subtle elegance. Tant cotton breathes extremely well — a favourite for daily wear in all seasons.

reviews.comment: Beautiful colour. Washed well and did not fade at all.
Colour is exactly as shown. Delivery was fast too.

fabric_swatches.description: Hand block-printed in Sanganer, Jaipur, this cotton saree features a floral block print made using natural or vegetable dyes. Each print is slightly unique — a mark of genuine handcraft. Light and casual-ready.

reviews.comment: Good quality cotton. Feels premium for the price.
Fine weave, lovely texture. Will order again.

fabric_swatches.description: This cotton saree from Bagru, Rajasthan uses the traditional dabu resist printing method. The geometric block print is earthy and distinctive. Lightweight and light, each piece carries the character of natural dye craft.

reviews.comment: Wore this to office every week. Comfortable and looks neat.
Good everyday saree. Simple and elegant.

fabric_swatches.description: Woven in the Shantipur tradition of West Bengal, this Tant cotton saree is prized for its fine weave and light drape. The plain with contrast border adds subtle elegance. Tant cotton breathes extremely well — a favourite for daily wear in all seasons.

reviews.comment: The border design is very pretty. Drapes well too.
Exactly as described. The zari border is beautiful.

fabric_swatches.description: Woven in the historically significant Chendamangalam cluster of Kerala, this cotton saree has a fine count plain that is quietly elegant. Fine thread count, soft texture, and understated beauty make it ideal for casual.

reviews.comment: My mother loved this saree. Perfect for casual puja days.
Very comfortable in humid weather. Recommend for South India.

fabric_swatches.description: A high-quality Coimbatore cotton saree with a plain. Coimbatore is known for producing India's finest cotton — and this piece shows why. Durable, light, and very comfortable for daily or casual use.

reviews.comment: Light and easy to manage. Great for summer.
Weaver did amazing work. The pattern is crisp.

fabric_swatches.description: This Salem cotton saree features a plain with woven border. Salem weaves are known for excellent colour retention and durability. A practical, light saree that holds up beautifully through regular wear.

Good quality cotton. Feels premium for the price.

fabric_swatches.description: A signature Chanderi saree featuring a butis with gold motif. Chanderi fabric is celebrated for its sheer, flowy quality and subtle sheen — it catches light beautifully. The gold motifs are handwoven, not printed. A timeless piece for wedding.

reviews.comment: Semi-formal and beautiful. Easy to manage for long events.
Good for both day and evening events. Versatile pick.

fabric_swatches.description: A signature Chanderi saree featuring a plain with small butis. Chanderi fabric is celebrated for its sheer, flowy quality and subtle sheen — it catches light beautifully. The gold motifs are handwoven, not printed. A timeless piece for summer wedding.

reviews.comment: Lovely fabric. Slightly sheer but very elegant for evening.
Perfect blend — light enough for summer but rich enough for weddings.

fabric_swatches.description: This Maheshwari saree from Khargone, Madhya Pradesh features a reversible border. Maheshwari weaves are known for their reversible border and fine texture. Versatile and wedding-appropriate, a versatile wardrobe staple.

reviews.comment: The ikat pattern is stunning. Cannot believe this is custom-made.
The drape is lovely. Wore this for an evening wedding. Perfect.

fabric_swatches.description: A handwoven Pochampally Ikat saree featuring a geometric ikat. The double ikat technique means both warp and weft threads are resist-dyed before weaving — creating the distinctive blurred-edge pattern. A GI-tagged craft from Telangana. Elegant and striking for wedding.

reviews.comment: Great blend. Breathable yet looks festive. Recommend for summer weddings.
Good weight. Not too heavy, not too light. Just right.

fabric_swatches.description: This Ilkal weave from Karnataka features a Ilkal traditional border. The signature contrasting border is woven separately and joined — a technique unique to Ilkal. Traditional and perfect for wedding.

reviews.comment: Chanderi quality at a fair price. The sheen is gorgeous.
Beautiful colour. The cotton-silk mix is exactly what I wanted.

fabric_swatches.description: A Nuapatna ikat saree from Cuttack, Odisha featuring a ikat geometric. Nuapatna is known for intricate temple and geometric motifs achieved through tie-dye ikat. The versatile fabric and vibrant colours make it ideal for festival.

reviews.comment: The ikat pattern is stunning. Cannot believe this is custom-made.
The drape is lovely. Wore this for an evening wedding. Perfect.

fabric_swatches.description: This Kota Doria saree from Rajasthan features a square weave plain. The hallmark square weave structure gives it an unmistakable texture that is airy, sheer, and incredibly elegant. A top choice for summer weddings.

reviews.comment: Great blend. Breathable yet looks festive. Recommend for summer weddings.
Good weight. Not too heavy, not too light. Just right.

fabric_swatches.description: A signature Chanderi saree featuring a scattered silver butis. Chanderi fabric is celebrated for its sheer, flowy quality and subtle sheen — it catches light beautifully. The gold motifs are handwoven, not printed. A timeless piece for wedding.

reviews.comment: Chanderi quality at a fair price. The sheen is gorgeous.
Beautiful colour. The cotton-silk mix is exactly what I wanted.

fabric_swatches.description: A Banarasi cotton-silk blend featuring a light brocade jaal. Lighter than pure Banarasi silk but carrying the same elegance of the jaal brocade. Elegant and beautiful for festive wedding.

reviews.comment: Nice soft feel. The colour matches the photo perfectly.
Flowy and elegant. Got many compliments at the festival.

fabric_swatches.description: This Ilkal weave from Karnataka features a Ilkal signature border. The signature contrasting border is woven separately and joined — a technique unique to Ilkal. Traditional and perfect for wedding.

reviews.comment: Ordered twice already. This weaver does excellent work.
Ordered for my daughter's engagement. She looked stunning.

fabric_swatches.description: This Maheshwari saree from Khargone, Madhya Pradesh features a reversible border. Maheshwari weaves are known for their reversible border and fine texture. Versatile and festival-appropriate, a versatile wardrobe staple.

reviews.comment: Good for both day and evening events. Versatile pick.
Good quality. The border design is unique and handloom feel is real.

fabric_swatches.description: This Kota Doria saree from Rajasthan features a plain square weave. The hallmark square weave structure gives it an unmistakable texture that is airy, sheer, and incredibly elegant. A top choice for summer weddings.

reviews.comment: Perfect blend — light enough for summer but rich enough for weddings.
Semi-formal and beautiful. Easy to manage for long events.

fabric_swatches.description: A Nuapatna ikat saree from Cuttack, Odisha featuring a vibrant ikat geometric. Nuapatna is known for intricate temple and geometric motifs achieved through tie-dye ikat. The festive fabric and vibrant colours make it ideal for festival.

reviews.comment: The drape is lovely. Wore this for an evening wedding. Perfect.
Lovely fabric. Slightly sheer but very elegant for evening.

fabric_swatches.description: A Bhagalpuri cotton-silk blend featuring a tussar texture cotton silk blend. The Tussar-like texture combined with cotton gives a textured drape with earthy richness. Great for semi formal occasions.

reviews.comment: Good weight. Not too heavy, not too light. Just right.
The ikat pattern is stunning. Cannot believe this is custom-made.

fabric_swatches.description: A Salem cotton-silk blend featuring a plain with woven border. Salem's weaves are known for excellent colour retention and durability. Comfortable formal and practical for regular wedding wear.

reviews.comment: Beautiful colour. The cotton-silk mix is exactly what I wanted.
Great blend. Breathable yet looks festive. Recommend for summer weddings.

fabric_swatches.description: A Kora cotton-silk saree featuring a plain. Kora fabric has a distinctive raw texture that is uniquely flowy. The cotton-silk blend makes it breathable yet elegant — perfect for summer events.

reviews.comment: Flowy and elegant. Got many compliments at the festival.
Chanderi quality at a fair price. The sheen is gorgeous.

fabric_swatches.description: A Pochampally cotton-silk blend featuring a ikat checks. The ikat pattern has that distinctive handcrafted blur that no machine can replicate. Versatile drape makes it ideal for festival occasions.

reviews.comment: Ordered for my daughter's engagement. She looked stunning.
Nice soft feel. The colour matches the photo perfectly.

fabric_swatches.description: A cotton-silk Paithani-style saree from Yeola featuring a simplified Paithani style. The cotton-silk blend gives a elegant drape while the Paithani border retains its characteristic sheen. Ideal for festive wedding.

reviews.comment: Good quality. The border design is unique and handloom feel is real.
Ordered twice already. This weaver does excellent work.

fabric_swatches.description: An Uppada Jamdani saree featuring a jamdani floral weave. The Jamdani weave inserts supplementary threads to create intricate designs without embroidery. Luxurious silk with a distinctly artistic quality.

reviews.comment: Good silk quality. Slight colour variation from photo but still beautiful.
Best silk saree I have bought online. Stunning piece.

fabric_swatches.description: A classic Venkatagiri cotton saree featuring a fine zari border. The gold zari work is handwoven directly into the fabric — not printed or added on. Lightweight and light, this is a go-to for wedding occasions.

reviews.comment: Colour is exactly as shown. Delivery was fast too.
Exactly what I needed for daily wear. Soft and breathable all day.

fabric_swatches.description: Classic Kerala kasavu featuring a double kasavu border. Pure cotton with a handwoven gold border — the signature of Kerala's weaving tradition. Light and elegant for Onam, weddings, and formal occasions.

reviews.comment: Fine weave, lovely texture. Will order again.
Beautiful colour. Washed well and did not fade at all.
